features: Multiple Travel Accessories: This 26-piece Travel Bottles Set including 2*60 ml squeeze bottles, 2*100 ml travel bottles, 2*10 g big cream jars, 2*10 g small cream jars, 2*5 g crystal cream jars, 4*spoons, 2*toothbrush covers, 1*10 ml lotion bottle, 1*10 ml pump bottle, 2*small funnel, 1*tweezers, 1*dispense straw, 1*clean brush, 1*transparent zippered bag, 1 page of handwritable labels and 1 page with text labels. A wide range of accessories in one place to suit your every need.

Reusable Travel Containers Set: Made from high-quality silicone and PP materials, the travel bottles for toiletries are odorless, colorfast, and reusable. Simply wash and air dry them after use, suitable for frequent travellers. No more carrying all kinds of bulky bottles and jars, just this travel set will do the trick.

Triple Leak-proof Design: Our travel toiletry bottles are designed with a triple leak-proof lid to ensure that they won't spill or leak during use. The transparent zippered travel pouch included helps to store the travel kit to keep your luggage neat and tidy, preventing any spills from ruining your clothes while on the go.

Wide Mouth Silicone Travel Bottles: The silicone bottle with large opening is easy to fill and clean, it's a good choice for shampoo, conditioner, body wash, lotion and other toiletries, you can also use our brush to clean the inside of the bottle after use. The silicone material can easily squeeze out the liquid inside the bottle without worrying about waste.

Versatile Cream Jars: Our 26-piece travel size toiletries have 6 cream jars in 3 different styles, these cream jars can not only be used to hold creams, eye creams, lotions and other creams, but also can be used to store necklaces, earrings, rings, and other small jewellery, keeping them organized and secure during travel, don't have to worry about losing, and different styles and colours can be easy to distinguish between them.
